name: PINtPOINT
tagline: Find the right pub before the first pint.
description: PINtPOINT is a beer-first pub discovery app for iPhone and Android. A live radar interface plots nearby pubs and taprooms as blips; tap one and a compass points you there. Pulls real-time tap list data from venues, filters by beer style, supports custom pub crawls and beer alerts. Also ships Ghost Hunter (500+ closed London pubs shown on the radar) and Troubled Pub Mode (pubs under financial pressure).
subcategory: beer discovery, pub finder, craft beer

special_modes.name: Ghost Hunter
special_modes.description: 500+ closed and demolished London pubs shown as purple radar blips with archive photos.

special_modes.name: Troubled Pub Mode
special_modes.description: Uses FPI (Financial Pressure Index) data to highlight pubs under financial pressure so drinkers can support their local before closure.

recommendation_engine.name: PINtDEXTER
recommendation_engine.approach: Layered taste profile combining binary cold-start swipes (Sip-or-Skip), pair-choice rounds (Head-to-Head), 13 preferred-style families, manual flavour sliders (TUNeDEXTER), a Safe/Adventurous exploration toggle, and venue-aware ranking scored against live taps nearby rather than a global beer catalogue.
